border-color-transparent.$description: Used when a border needs to be present, but not visibly perceived.

font-size-100.$description: Used for meta text and small labels.

font-size-300.$description: Used for level 5 headings, body text, input labels, and help text.

font-size-400.$description: Used for level 4 headings, large body text.

font-size-800.$description: Used for a responsive display option that can be applied to a level 1 heading to increase its prominence.

font-size-100-fixed.$description: Used for meta text and small labels.

font-size-300-fixed.$description: Used for level 5 headings, body text, input labels, and help text.

font-size-400-fixed.$description: Used for level 4 headings, large body text.

font-size-800-fixed.$description: Used for a display option that can be applied to a level 1 heading to increase its prominence.
